from celery import Celery

celery = Celery("myapp", broker="redis://localhost:6379/0")


@celery.task
def send_email(user_id, subject, body):
    from myapp.db import get_session
    from myapp.mailer import Mailer

    session = get_session()
    user = session.query(User).get(user_id)
    mailer = Mailer()
    mailer.send(user.email, subject, body)


@celery.task
def process_upload(file_path):
    from myapp.config import get_upload_folder

    upload_folder = get_upload_folder()
    with open(f"{upload_folder}/{file_path}", "rb") as f:
        data = f.read()
    return len(data)
